title: TC4 wand focus cost/cooldown/sync parity
implemented: cooldown applied through Player#getCooldowns after successful cast
focus failure plays original wandfail sound
server-side beams and particles preserve TC4 feedback adapter path
equal trade expanded from one-block drift to TC4-like 3x3 planar exchange
deviation_notes: Original projectile entity classes are not dropped in directly; behavior is adapted through modern ray/beam runtime until entity ports are completed.
Focus upgrade branches remain unresolved instead of approximated.
